How it works

From booking to reminder in 20 seconds.

The patient books online — the appointment shows up in your calendar instantly. Confirmation and reminder go out automatically. No phone calls, no callbacks, no forgotten "dentist tomorrow at 10".

Patient view · hilddental.com

Features

Everything you need, nothing you don't.

No bloated software. No training weekend. Just the tools you actually use in a practice every day.

⚡

Live in 5 minutes — really.

Upload your logo, enter your office hours, done. We set everything up — you take bookings. No IT team needed.

🔒

GDPR-ready.

Servers in Germany. Encrypted data. Patient records stay yours, always.

🛡️
👥

Patients at a glance.

Contact, history, notes — automatically linked and instantly searchable.

MS
Maria Schmidt
12 appts
TW
Thomas Weber
8 appts
AF
Anna Fischer
New
🕐

Patients book 24/7.

Evenings, weekends, holidays. While you sleep, your calendar fills itself.

24
📧

Automatic reminders.

Email confirmations and 24-hour reminders. Fewer no-shows, more healthy patients.

🎨

Your branding, not ours.

Logo, colors, domain — the booking page belongs to your practice. Patients never see "Praxmate".

We used to spend 2 hours every Monday morning returning calls. Since Praxmate, half our patients book at 11 p.m. We got Saturdays back.
JH
Dr. Juliane Hild
Hild Dental Practice · Sersheim, Germany
Pricing

Simple pricing, no surprises.

3 months free. Then from €39 / month. Cancel anytime.

Solo
Single practice · 1 practitioner
€ 39 / month
Get started
  • Online booking for patients
  • Automatic reminders
  • Patient management
  • GDPR-compliant
  • English & German support
Popular
Team
Mid-size practice · up to 3 practitioners
€ 69 / month
Get started
  • Everything in Solo
  • 3 practitioners with own schedules
  • Multiple treatment types
  • Team accounts (owner / doctor / staff)
  • Custom domain
  • Priority support
Practice
Large practice · up to 10 practitioners
€ 119 / month
Get started
  • Everything in Team
  • Up to 10 practitioners
  • Custom logo + colors
  • Embed widget for your website
  • Advanced analytics
  • Dedicated account manager

Just call us.
